title: Make archive growth a warning threshold
rawUserRequest: 归档会一直增加，不能总是被卡住。将上线归档增长阈值改成 200，超过后给出警告，不再阻塞流程；结构性证据错误仍然硬失败。

declaredIntent.summary: 把 archiveGrowth 从会阻塞归档的硬预算上限改为 200 的可见预警阈值，避免历史归档增长永久阻断发布流程。

outOfScope: Rewriting immutable archived Work Item evidence
Changing archiveSequence allocation or repairing the already blocked PR #316
Creating or publishing a release tag or GitHub Release

sources.reason: Documents the distinction between warning thresholds and hard evidence-integrity gates.
Allows archive growth threshold overruns to warn without blocking archive mutation.
Reports archiveGrowth threshold overruns as warnings under the policy.
Separates observational archive growth threshold warnings from structural archive integrity failures.
Verifies archive mutation remains allowed above the warning threshold.
Verifies budget impact reports warning-only archive growth overruns.
Verifies archive integrity remains fail-closed while growth is warning-only.
Declares the functional policy change and its boundaries.

riskAssessment.reason: The change relaxes only the archive growth budget threshold; archive evidence integrity remains fail-closed and is covered by regression tests.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized the functional archive-growth policy correction.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm warning-only behavior is limited to archiveGrowth and does not weaken structural archive integrity gates.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record before-edit and before-finish evidence for the policy behavior change.

acceptance: governance_complexity_policy.yaml sets archiveGrowth to 200 with warning enforcement.
Archive growth above 200 is visible as a warning but does not block budget preflight or archive mutation.
Duplicate archive sequences and other archive evidence integrity violations remain hard failures.
Regression tests cover warning-only growth and hard structural failures.
The governance workflow documentation explains the threshold semantics.
guidelines: Policy semantics are documented in the governance workflow guide.
The change preserves existing module boundaries and uses current shared helpers.

intent.problem: The immutable archive count keeps increasing, but archiveGrowth is currently treated as a hard budget ceiling. This causes routine lifecycle closure and release work to be blocked by historical record growth rather than by a current integrity defect.
constraints: The threshold is 200 and overruns are warning-only.
Duplicate archiveSequence, missing evidence, digest mismatch, and Contract/Summary inconsistency remain hard failures.
Do not rewrite historical archive evidence or publish a release in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Separate observational repository growth from evidence integrity so the archive can continue to grow while real corruption remains fail-closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the functional governance policy correction and explicitly requested a 200 warning threshold.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Archive growth is now an observational warning metric; no budget-only repayment Work Item is required.
